# Coldcard Multisig setup file — 3-of-5 mainnet P2WSH.
# No XFP header (per-cosigner XFPs in <XFP>: <xpub> form on each cosigner line).
# Shared-derivation shape. Uses 5 distinct mainnet xpubs from the toolkit's
# existing test corpus; each per-cosigner XFP matches xpub.fingerprint() so
# the parse path is the silent-match row of the 5-row truth table.
Name: TestMs3of5
Policy: 3 of 5
Derivation: m/48'/0'/0'/2'
Format: P2WSH
